parsed.rationale: The Caudal fin is located at the posterior end of the fish skeleton. Visually, the rays extending from the Caudal fin are significantly longer than those of the other labeled fins. The Dorsal fin rays are shorter and more compact. The Anal fin rays are also shorter than the Caudal fin rays. Therefore, the Caudal fin has the longest fin rays.
